transcript.text:
[One peaceful day in Gwango Traditional Market]
Oh my God
Let's mix it
[Have you heard of Octopus Noodles?]
[Noodles+Webfoot Octopus]
[From Icheon]
That's a lot of food
[Can she finish it all?]
[Don't even worry]
[Oh my]
Excuse me, I'll take fried rice
That looks so good
[Let's mix it up for the finale]
Can I serve myself?
More?
You're going to kill yourself

Hello everyone
I filmed here at Icheon Marketplace the other day
And there were a lot of good spots here
There was this thing called "Octopus-Noodles"
I came here to check out that unique dish
It looks pretty old "Somunana Kalguksu"
[Somunan Kalguksu] [Icheon, Gwango-dong]
Hello
I saw on the internet
It's called Octopus-Noodles
It's like stir-fried webfoot octopus with noodles
Different sizes here
I heard they give out big portions
So just 2 large sizes for now
2 large orders of the Noodle-Octopus, please
-Large? -Yes, 2 of them

-1 order is 4 servings -Yes, 2 of them
2 orders of large
-Who's eating those? -Here
-She can't do it
They're enormous
[Let's see what they're about]
[Noodles cooked in broth]
[Octopus-Noodles]
[Garnish]
[Meal is served]
Thank you
Here they are They look like stir-fried webfoot octopus
Let's try the soup first Let's see which one is spicy
I think this one is regular
That's tasty
The sauce is savory and spicy

They're like stir-fried webfoot octopus
Let's mix it up
That's a lot of food
Can I finish it all?
Forreals?
That's a lot of noodles
I'm worried that they will get soggy
Let's dig in
Bon appetit
I don't cut the noodles usually But I had to because of the hotness
[Another try]
This is that
You know when you have a tasty stir-fried webfoot octopus dish
With noodles added
That's amazing
Get this much noodles

A lot of octopus in here too
Let's get a spoonful of it
That's delicious
How can I explain this?
I keep getting it on myself
The noodles are cooked really well
Perfectly cooked
Just about right
I hope they stay like this Don't get bloated!
That's good
Let's mix them up before they get soggy
[Cramping up]
I just got cramps
Get a good amount
Rice cakes in here too
I love these

Love it
Get some octopus
It's not spicy, but it's hot
Fried rice would be good here too
Thin noodles are usually good here
It'd be good if they serve thin noodles with these
Can I have some more broth, please
This tastes like kalguksu broth That should be good too
[Burning her mouth]
[This bowl alone looks like 1 serving]
Did you starve yourself?
No, I had meals before
[You're kidding...]
It has a kick to it
That webfoot octopus sauce
It's starting to get a little spicy

It's creeping up
I think this place gets crowded easily
I just saw a bunch of them come inside
The soup hits the spot
I only have this much left here
I've rushed it Without talking as much
[She's eaten that much?]
That's tasty
[She likes it]
Does your mom know?
Your mother will be surprised
How do you stay skinny?
I gain weight from water
Excuse me
I'll take 1 fried rice
-Can you eat it? -Yes, it looks tasty

-Here -Thank you, looks good
[Rice is a must]
-Do you have sesame oil? -It's inside
-Are you okay? -Yes, I'm doing good
That looks good
-Enjoy -Thank you
I can smell the sesame oil
This is webfoot octopus rice!
I had the stir-fried octopus, the noodles, and the rice?
This made 3 meals
That's very savory
Amazing
The octopus is so tender
This is popular, right?
The young people love it
I have never seen such a skinny person eat this much

This is the first ever in history
-It's all in here? -Yes, all in here
She doesn't have a belly
How is it so tender?
The octopus is very tender
That is very flavorful
Any more rice?
Sorry to bother you but, Can I get more rice from here?
-Mixing more? -It's tasty
[Oh my God]
-Thank you, I'll mix it up myself -No it's okay
Thank you
-Mix it more if you need to -Thank you
That looks delicious
Just like how you have it at home
This right here is it

This one is the spicy one
I didn't know until now
So many octopuses
I thought I needed fried rice, but Just mixing it is good enough
2 rice cakes
[On her 5th bowl of broth]
This is my last bite
2 large orders of webfoot octopus, 3 mixed rice, 5 bowls of broth, 6 cans of sodas
That's over 10 servings
That will get you killed
That was such a good meal
Thanks everyone~
You did a good job today [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
